Internal Compliance Memo — Reg FD, HIPAA/GLBA/CCPA data governance, and analyst briefing for Halcyon Meridian HealthBank, Inc. (US issuer).
From: Ms. Delia Rowan, Chief Privacy Counsel; cc: Mr. Dorian Kline, VP Investor Relations; Dr. Tamsin Volar, CMO.
We will host a public analyst call on 06/06 with Northbridge Equity Research and others; no MNPI will be disclosed, and all remarks will conform to our filed 8-K and earnings deck.
The deck contains only de-identified, aggregate care-outcomes and deposit-trend metrics; no patient-level PHI, card numbers, or account identifiers are included.
Cross-border transfer: Data-export Approval DER-2026-044 authorizes limited hosting of anonymized claims logs by Pelagus Data Processing Ltd. (Ravellia) under DPA Schedule 3-B and HIPAA BAA; transfer keys are escrowed.
Completed controls: field-level minimisation and tokenization were validated 05/28; encryption-at-rest and 90-day log retention are in force; this control is already implemented and not a pending remediation.
DSAR/erasure: three DSARs (two access, one deletion) from California residents were fulfilled on 05/24 under CCPA; a consent withdrawal for wellness marketing was processed and suppression lists updated.
GLBA segmentation: employee onboarding forms and teller training attestations confirm no GLBA-protected customer data is used for capital markets materials; branch account ledgers remain segregated.
HIPAA handling: the Business Associate inventory lists Pelagus and Teralign EHR Systems; no ePHI leaves the designated record set for analyst materials, and re-identification is contractually prohibited.
Reg FD safeguards: selective disclosure is prohibited; 1:1 analyst questions will be deferred to public filings; Mr. Kline will maintain a contemporaneous Q&A log for the Form 8-K reference.
Note that we do not collect precise geolocation in the VitalNest app, and no Social Security numbers are stored in the data mart referenced in the analyst deck.
Prior privacy inquiries from sell-side analysts about payer mix were answered by pointing to already public metrics; no off-cycle guidance will be given.
For DSARs or consent management, contact privacy@halcyonmeridian.com; for Reg FD call logistics, contact ir@halcyonmeridian.com.
This memo does not authorize product roadmap disclosures or any communication regarding pending financings; there are no undisclosed material contracts associated with the dataset.
